title: TBD Map Object Instance (catalog v1 placement row)
description: One placed object. Compact: references its prefab by index; never duplicates kind/class/resourceName/bounds (resolve via prefabs[prefabId]). T-090.2. Three equivalent encodings: an expanded object (golden/readability), a legacy id-first positional array [id, prefabId, x, y, z?, rotationDeg?], or the T-090.3.1 chunk wire tuple [prefabId, x, y, z, rotationDeg] (all numbers; id derived as {cx}_{cy}:{index}). Discriminator: element 0 string = legacy tuple, element 0 number = chunk tuple.

oneOf.description: Legacy positional tuple [id, prefabId, x, y, z?, rotationDeg?] (T-110 binary compile input). Position 0 is the string id; 1 is the integer prefabId; 2..5 are numbers (x, y, z?, rotationDeg?).

Chunk wire tuple v2 [prefabId, x, y, z, rotationDeg] (T-090.3.1, plan §3.2) — all numbers, exactly 5. Instance id is derived from chunk file + index ({cx}_{cy}:{index}), unique by construction (G5). Written by objects/chunks/{cx}_{cy}.json.gz only.
